attributes.action: Start Meningitis B vaccine catch-up for all teenagers and young adults
attributes.additional_details:
My brother died from Men B at 16. Now there is a vaccine available for this Men B this should be provided to all teenagers & young adults to prevent death or permanent disability. No family should have to go through what we went through. 

Men B accounts for 86.2% of cases of meningitis in the U.K. and was the cause of all meningococcal disease cases in 15 to 19 year olds in 2024/25. It has a death rate of 10%

https://www.gov.uk/government/news/vaccination-crucial-as-meningitis-cases-increase
attributes.background:
I call on the U.K. government to introduce a Meningitis B catch-up vaccination scheme for all teenagers and young adults at university. 

The Men B vaccine was introduced 
for babies in 2015. Teenagers & young adults who are at great risk from this deadly disease have not been eligible

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Offer MenB vaccine to under 22s born before 2015" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764623
